name: Gelson's
description: Log into your Gelson's grocery account for automated shopping workflows.

functions.name: login
functions.description: Log into the Gelson's account. Must succeed before search, cart, or checkout operations.

functions.name: search
functions.description: Search for products on Gelson's. Returns gelsons_item_id (use this verbatim with add_to_cart), prices, sizes, stock status, and URLs.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

functions.name: check_session
functions.description: Check if the browser session is currently logged into Gelson's.

functions.name: add_to_cart
functions.description: Add a product to the Gelson's cart. The product must be visible on the current page (run search first). Specify quantity to add more than one.

gelsons_item_id.description: The exact gelsons_item_id from search results. Must be copied verbatim — do not paraphrase or shorten.

quantity.description: Number of items to add. Defaults to 1.
